title.en: Among them, the Holy Illusion is one of the cor...

content.en:
The Holy Illusion Realm is not an ordinary place, many people don't know about the existence of this place at all, and Ye Tian has now gradually entered the high-level circle of the human race, so he knows a lot of secrets.

Among them, the Holy Illusion is one of the core secrets of the human race.

The Holy Illusion Realm is actually a supreme treasure, but it is not an ordinary supreme treasure, but the top supreme treasure, and it is also one of the foundations of human beings.

The Holy Illusion is in the Holy City, and there are many Celestial Beings and a Supreme Guardian to ensure that there are no problems with the Holy Illusion.

The Holy Illusion does not have any offensive or defensive effects, it is a support type of Supreme Treasure that increases the level of the state of mind.

In the division of the human race's state of mind, the state of mind is divided into seven levels, but Ye Tian knows that there is a higher level of state of mind under the seventh state of mind, but with the current human state of mind method, there is no way to improve to the eighth state of mind.

And the seventh state of mind is enough to impact the Heavenly Venerable realm, whether it can be elevated to the eighth state of mind is not very important to those Heavenly Venerables or even the supreme.

"The reason why the Masters want to enter the Holy Realm is because the Holy Realm has the hope of helping them to reach the seventh realm of mind, so that the only shackles that can impact the Heavenly Venerable realm will disappear, otherwise forcibly impacting the Heavenly Venerable realm, it is very likely that the state of mind will collapse and die. I have already attained the sixth level of state of mind, and I am not far from the seventh level of state of mind. However, my accumulation far exceeds that of others, so naturally I can't have the same requirements as others, and I must raise my state of mind to the seventh level as soon as possible! Once I achieve the seventh level of state of mind, the universe will collapse, and my state of mind will not collapse. Only with that state of mind can we endure any hardships and sufferings and be able to reach the pinnacle realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In addition, another reason why Ye Tian wanted to achieve the seventh-layer state of mind was that he felt that it was a little difficult for him to control his powerful physical body.

Purely in terms of physical strength, he doesn't know how many times to complete those supremes, but the supreme has the blessing of supreme power, so he can't compete with the supreme.

But with such a terrifying physical strength, the level of mood is not high, just like a child holding a hammer, it is a little difficult to wield.

And Ye Tian is now in this embarrassing realm!

If Ye Tian's physical strength continued to improve in the future, it would be difficult for him to exert the explosive power of his physical body.

Therefore, it is urgent to raise the level of mood.

Originally, Ye Tian was also very worried about how to improve the level of his state of mind, but now that the opportunity has come, this time he has won the opportunity to enter the Holy Illusion Realm, and he must grasp it.

As for not being able to enter the Holy Illusion Realm in the future, he doesn't care!

When his state of mind was raised to the seventh level, the Holy Illusion Realm would not be of much help to him, and it would naturally matter if he could enter it or not.

......

Holy City.

On this day, Ye Tian came here.

At the beginning, Ye Tian didn't know where the Holy Illusion Realm was, he just knew that the Holy Illusion Realm was in the Holy City, and the other news was unknown.

When he entered the Holy City, a master took Ye Tian to the Supreme Pavilion of the Holy City!

The Supreme Pavilion is a place where the statues of the Supreme Beings are placed, and it is also a very important place of remembrance in the Holy City.

There are now twenty-four supreme beings in the human race, and the huge statues of these twenty-four supreme beings are located in the supreme pavilion, and few people usually come here, and they are often closed to the public.

"I didn't expect it to be here!"

Ye Tian was also a little surprised.

He thought that the Holy Illusion was in a very secret place!

Seeing that Ye Tian was very surprised, the accompanying master said, "Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch, you must be very curious about why the Holy Illusion Realm is placed in such a conspicuous place as the Supreme Pavilion, right? In fact, for the Supreme Being, if someone really invades the Holy City, it will not be safe anywhere. So, it's the same everywhere. In addition, the twenty-four statues in the Supreme Pavilion are very special, they can connect the main bodies of the twenty-four supremes, so that they can descend on their power and teleport over in an instant! Therefore, this is the fastest place for the supremes to support. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

After entering the Supreme Pavilion, Ye Tian was taken to the depths of the Supreme Pavilion.

After passing through layers of large arrays, he came to an ancient stone gate.

In the center of the stone gate, an illusory ball of light appeared in front of him.

This ball of light is the Holy Illusion!

In the vicinity of the Holy Illusion Realm, Ye Tian sensed several breaths, all of which were as powerful as the vast sea.

"It should be the Tianzun who is guarding here!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Soon, the Holy Illusion opened, turning into a small whirlpool.

"Let's go inside!"

A voice came from the darkness.

"Thank you, seniors!"

Ye Tian thanked him.

Instantly, he turned into a ray of light and entered the Holy Illusion Realm.

At this moment, the voices of several supreme beings sounded in the void.

"I have observed, the state of mind level of the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch has reached the sixth level, you say, can he use the Holy Illusion Realm to raise his state of mind to the seventh level this time?"

"It's too difficult, the gap between the sixth-level state of mind and the seventh-level state of mind is not a little bit. Among the human race, there are too many who have reached the sixth level of mentality, but too few have reached the seventh level. If the cultivation of the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch had reached the ultimate of domination, and he had gone through a long period of cultivation and tempering, I believed that he would be able to use the Holy Illusion Realm to impact the seventh-level state of mind. But now that he's too young, I don't think he can hit the seventh level of state of mind!"

"It's not certain, the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch is a person who creates miracles, and other people's examples are not suitable for the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch!"

"Let's wait silently, it won't be long before we know the result!"

The voices of the Heavenly Venerables gradually dissipated!

......

Holy Illusion.

Ye Tian entered here and came to a void.

There are no mountains and rivers, no flowers and trees, no wind, rain, thunder and lightning, and even no vitality.

It's a real place of nothingness!

However, there are still rules here, there is still a cosmic origin, even if it is a supreme treasure, there is no way to shield the cosmic origin rules.

"Joy!"

Ye Tian suddenly felt the joy of the immortal soul, as if there was an aura here that made the immortal soul extremely comfortable.

"I don't see much of the particularity for the time being, but I need to practice the Mind Realm Exercises here to be able to truly feel the particularity of the Holy Illusion Realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The state of mind exercise he was cultivating now was the Dark Silence True Sutra, and he immediately sat cross-legged and began to operate the Dark Silence True Sutra.

Rumble!!!!

In the endless darkness, a ray of light appeared in front of Ye Tian.

Soon, in this endless darkness, a figure almost identical to Ye Tian appeared there, and he was also cultivating the Dark Silence True Sutra.

Gradually, a powerful state of mind power emerged on the other party's body.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian finally understood the usefulness of the Holy Illusion Realm, it turned out to be to assist cultivators in comprehending the Mind Realm Method by showing the cultivation of the state of mind.

But immediately, Ye Tian frowned.

This method is good, but it requires a certain amount of understanding, otherwise there is really no way to understand the state of mind shown by the other party.

Of course!

Using this method, the chance of breaking the bottleneck and impacting the seventh-layer state of mind is still very high, which is many times stronger than cultivating alone and silently contemplating enlightenment.

"But this method is not suitable for me, my accumulation is still less, if I use this method, it is estimated that it will take a long time to break through, and it is impossible for the human race to develop the Holy Illusion Realm for too long!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After being silent for a while, Ye Tian suddenly thought of the Hades Secret Classic!
